strengths: 16+ years of continuous software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains — comfortably meets the 15-year minimum with genuine breadth

Active AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq (MCP generators, agentic workflow frameworks) and a founder background with GISCollective demonstrate both builder fluency and entrepreneurial initiative
Consistent knowledge-sharing record — conference talks (FOSS4G), full-day workshops on web internals and testing, and open-source library authorship signal the external influence the role requires
concerns: AI expertise is very recent (April 2025–present) and lacks demonstrated products or platforms at scale; no prior roles mention ML, AI, or cloud strategy work
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no published research or recognized industry presence in AI — the role explicitly prefers PhD/Master's and 'recognized expertise'

Career arc is that of a hands-on senior/staff engineer rather than a director-level strategic advisor; no evidence of advising enterprise customers, shaping product roadmaps at organizational scale, or driving cross-company technical strategy
response.justification: Bogdan is a highly competent, multi-disciplinary engineer with legitimate depth in software craftsmanship, open-source contribution, and community teaching, and his current role shows an early pivot toward AI tooling. However, the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) role is a director-level position that demands recognized AI expertise, cloud platform strategy experience, and a track record of advising enterprise partners — none of which are clearly evidenced in the resume. His AI work is too nascent and his profile too execution-focused to credibly fill the strategic, externally-facing seniority this role requires at this time.
